summary: Ship the plan. The RED record matches ffa1797 and fails on the exact firing symptom; the real-rule replay, L3 anti-false-GREEN control, L4 firing control, 3d window rationale, and FilesBackupStale backstop are coherent. Simpler alternative: delete FilesBulkSSDLow and rely on the earlier fail-loud BulkStorageLow alert, but that sacrifices the intended independent host-side sensor.
next_steps: Implement B-1 exactly as scoped, preserve the frozen regression artifacts, and let the pipeline generate GREEN evidence.
